immediate_actions: Deploy rapid response teams to Jankipuram for comprehensive case investigation and contact tracing
Alert all healthcare facilities across Lucknow to activate flu surveillance protocols and ensure prompt reporting
Activate the District Emergency Operations Center (DEOC) for inter-departmental coordination and resource management
Launch a city-wide public awareness campaign on flu symptoms, prevention measures, and reporting mechanisms through multiple media channels
Ensure adequate availability of testing kits, personal protective equipment (PPE), antivirals, and isolation facilities across Lucknow

containment_zones.name: Jankipuram
restrictions: Localized containment and cordon sanitaire around identified clusters
Mandatory symptom screening at key entry/exit points within Jankipuram
Closure of non-essential public gatherings, markets, and community centers
Intensive contact tracing for all 15 confirmed cases and their close contacts
Mandatory isolation for confirmed cases and high-risk contacts
Mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces within the zone
Enhanced sanitation and disinfection drives in public and common areas
Public awareness campaigns on flu symptoms, prevention, and reporting mechanisms
containment_zones.reason: Origin of the outbreak with 15 confirmed flu cases, active transmission and highest immediate risk.

containment_zones.name: Hazratganj
restrictions: Enhanced surveillance for flu-like symptoms in all healthcare facilities
Public health advisory on flu symptoms, personal hygiene, and respiratory etiquette
Preparation of rapid response teams for immediate deployment if cases emerge
Promotion of voluntary mask-wearing in crowded public spaces and public transport
containment_zones.reason: Zero projected cases, classified for proactive monitoring and preparedness.

alerts.message: सावधान: Jankipuram में flu के मामले मिले हैं। घर में पानी जमा न होने दें। नजदीकी टेस्टिंग सेंटर जाएं।
